evals.prompt: Build a harness for GIMP - I want an AI agent that can control GIMP through script-fu commands
evals.expected_output: Complete harness project structure for GIMP with backend wrapper, tool registry, and AGENTS.md
expectations: Project has package.json with correct name

evals.prompt: Create a harness project for my CLI tool that wraps ffmpeg for video processing
evals.expected_output: Basic harness project with ffmpeg backend integration and video processing tools

evals.prompt: Initialize a harness with OpenAI provider support and multi-tool setup including bash, file operations, and web fetch
evals.expected_output: Harness project with OpenAI provider, multiple tools, and OpenCode integration
expectations: BashTool, FileReadTool, FileWriteTool, GrepTool, GlobTool, WebFetchTool all present
